title: Claims-to-Evidence Audit: PRMP Publication Readiness Assessment
summary: Demo notebook for the PRMP publication readiness audit that maps 7 paper claims (C1–C7) to quantitative evidence across 6 experiments. Loads pre-computed audit data from mini_demo_data.json, demonstrates statistical helper functions (Cohen's d, paired t-tests), displays claims analysis with conclusions, builds a 6×7 evidence matrix (experiments × claims), shows cross-experiment consistency and reviewer objections, computes overall confidence assessment (verdict: partial_confirm — 4 confirmed, 2 disconfirmed, 1 inconclusive), and produces a 4-panel visualization with evidence heatmap, claim confidence bars, key metrics, and verdict summary. Uses scipy.stats for statistical computations and matplotlib for visualization.
